name: quick announcement
description:
ill keep it short since its important and easy to read & understand!

bot changes & life update

BOT CHANGES

i took a long time to decide on this but, i have to make this decision. some old bots of mine will be deleted or privated.

due to this changes, i will...

• remove most of my published bots

• revamp SOME old bots if i want too

• remake the old bot

bots include such as

• that one alpha bot

• Yuma, older brother bot

• and etc.

UPDATE: 10/31/25

privated both Yuma's bot due to Jai's new policy, will be revamped in the future.

i truly appreciate everyone who supported me ever since from the start, and im glad that people liked old bots of mine. though, it was incredibly stressful. now for the reasons for this decision, lets get on on the second part!

LIFE UPDATE

i went on a hiatus due to the fact that life has been full of downs and hard because of college & work, i fell back to old habits and neglected writing. i told myself it was all just for fun, but thoes words ate me as the reviews in some of my old bots had began to affect me.

at first, the harsh words didn't affect me that much— then slowly it began to become more pressure. i did not like how toxic and out of respect the people were in the comments and as a result, i do not like most of my old bots.

im very much sorry for suddenly dissapearing out of nowhere. i hope some people here are used to it hehe since it's genuinely just a habit. i also hope that it's understandable since im a human just like you guys, and not some robot who writes bots fast.

so, WHAT NOW? (for the people whos lazy to read everything)

• Old bots will be privated, some revamped in the future

• Boundaries are changed (please read my profile hihi thx)

• Change of scheadule

- I will sometimes publish bots, if i want too or have some motivation so it's pretty much random..

that's all! thank you so much for reading everything and understanding, I'll meet you guys again in the next bot (soon ;3)
creator: yurawrz
